name: ultra-compress-ai
description: UltraCompress AI - Cross-platform video, image, and file compression

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @ultra/shared && concurrently -k -n api,web -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w @ultra/backend" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:4000/api/health -t 60000 && npm run dev -w @ultra/web"
scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -n web,api,electron -c cyan,magenta,green "npm run dev -w @ultra/web" "npm run dev -w @ultra/backend" "npm run dev -w @ultra/desktop"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @ultra/shared && npm run build -w @ultra/backend && npm run build -w @ultra/web
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build && npm run build -w @ultra/desktop
